{{Infobox concept
| name = Forger
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Forger Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A Forger is a type of [[sacred artist]] who specializes in the manipulation and shaping of [[madra]] into physical or illusory forms. This discipline is considered one of the four fundamental skills required to become a [[sacred artist]], and practitioners often use hammer-themed badges to signify their expertise. [[Forging]] is closely related to [[Soulsmithing]], as both involve taking control of power to give it structure and form. Forgers utilize various techniques depending on their specific [[Path]]. Those on the [[Path of the White Fox]] use the [[Fox Mirror technique]] to create highly detailed illusions made of light and dreams. While these deceptions can mimic reality—including creating duplicate people, false walls, or camouflaged environments—they lack physical substance and can be easily destroyed by attacks. Other Forgers focus on creating tangible constructs, such as weapons, shields, or even complex entities that appear to possess [[life]]. These manifestations can range from simple, temporary objects like needles or cleavers to advanced, long-lasting constructs and intricate security systems. The complexity of a Forger's work is often determined by their ability to manage the specific properties of different types of [[madra]] and [[dead matter]].}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|A [[Forger]] is a soul type characterized by the hammer symbol and uses techniques to create weapons and wealth for the clan.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c1">''Unsouled'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] asks [[Yerin]] if she is a [[Forger]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17">''Unsouled'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Starting as a [[Forger]] means one will have to work extra hard as an [[Enforcer]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The symbol of a [[Forger]] is a hammer.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18">''Soulsmith'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Forgers can make solid illusions.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Forger]] is a type of technique.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Pure [[madra]] is not an effective weapon even for a [[Forger]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A [[Forger]] was raising her own defense.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Forger]] is part of the combatants.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A man in gold armor uses the [[Forger technique]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
